violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. The PIC has completed ServSafe, it is required for establishment to register one trained individual. Establishment to register trained food safety manager with DOH. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice Machine was emptied, and cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the kitchen and bar. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

A hose is connected to the ice machine and is being stored in the service sink. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. Hose was removed from, the sink, now being stored to the side of the machine, Maintenace person is to remove hose once they service establishment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
The over flow from the ice sink at the bar is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
The floor in the dining area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Corrective Action - Broken tiles are to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
